scenarios.title: Annotation slots come from the live compiled intent

gherkin.given: the disposable test stack has the compiler enabled through the real ML route and the input omits legacy annotation keywords
gherkin.when: an authenticated user sends the annotation turn over POST /api/assistant/turn
gherkin.then: a persistent ConfirmCard is returned from compiled state-mutation slots and accepting it applies the compiled values exactly once

scenarios.title: Springfield ambiguity creates a persistent choice

gherkin.given: the compiler and location normalization capability are wired
gherkin.when: an authenticated user asks for Springfield weather over HTTP
gherkin.then: the response contains a persistent DisambiguationPrompt with at least two choices and no weather lookup occurs before selection

gherkin.given: a prior HTTP turn persisted a DisambiguationPrompt
gherkin.when: the user submits one listed choice with the issued reference
gherkin.then: the same pending state is cleared exactly once and the selected candidate drives the resumed turn

scenarios.title: List write is not persisted before confirmation

gherkin.given: the compiler returns a validated list-write intent
gherkin.when: an authenticated user asks to add milk to a shopping list
gherkin.then: the response contains a persistent ConfirmCard and the list remains unchanged until acceptance

scenarios.title: Confirm acceptance executes the gated action once

gherkin.given: a prior HTTP turn persisted a ConfirmCard
gherkin.when: the user accepts the issued confirm reference
gherkin.then: the proposed action executes exactly once and replaying the same reference executes no additional action

scenarios.title: Required tests fail closed instead of skipping

gherkin.given: the five manifest-required assistant HTTP tests are selected through the repo CLI
gherkin.when: any required compiler, disambiguation, or confirmation behavior is absent
gherkin.then: the responsible test fails rather than calling a Go skip-family method and a healthy run reports five passes and zero skips
